§6Bismuth§f is a rare heavy metal for §badvanced alloys§f and specialty components.

§eObtaining:§f
• Bedrock ore processing with §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f
• §bSILEX§f processing of nuclear waste
• §bGas Centrifuge§f (rare byproduct)

§eUses:§f
• §bBiSmUTh Laser Crystal§f for FEL (300 kHE/s)
• Advanced alloys
• Specialty components

§aTip:§f Requires the complete High-Performance Solvent chain - a late-game material.
